Tests the behavior of the Math.atan function with an input of negative zero.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test assertion that checks the behavior of the `Math.atan` function in JavaScript. It verifies that when `Math.atan` is given `-0` as an input, it returns `-0` as the output. This test ensures that the function correctly handles negative zero, which is a special case in floating-point arithmetic. The use of `assert` indicates that this code is likely part of a test suite to validate the correctness of mathematical operations in a JavaScript environment.
